generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUst10LxLidar : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraVisualDataTransmitted
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for vehicle speed and state data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedStateDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUst10LxLidar
]

instance DepthCameraVisualDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VedderElectronicSpeedController
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringEnabler
]

instance DepthCameraVisualData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth camera visual data from Intel Deepsense D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraVisualDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterTrackingEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed and state data from Vedder ESC"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked objects from Kalman filter processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering using MATLAB/Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-based ACC control model for adaptive cruise control"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance DBSCANClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink-based DBSCAN clustering for point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC system processing for lead vehicle detection and speed calculation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing vehicle data and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for component integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for implementation of ROS2 nodes"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for performance-critical ROS2 nodes"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance WiFi : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected path"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight, ObjectTracksInsight, ProjectedPathInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system processing for lead vehicle detection and speed calculation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlDecisionInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable ACC, desired speed adjustment, emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteEnableACCAction, RemoteDisableACCAction, DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable report of vehicle speed and steering angle"
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of detected objects and their tracks"
]

instance ProjectedPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected path for autonomous navigation"
]

instance ACCControlDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC control decisions for maintaining safe following distance"
]

instance RemoteEnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RemoteDisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote disable ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking action triggered by ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for Physical Twin Entity"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for Digital Twin Entity"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for User Interface"
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for Cross-System communication"
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 node for data pre-processing"
]

instance ActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 node for actuation control"
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuator for vehicle propulsion"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator for vehicle steering"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, CrossSystemEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking) and remote management commands (enable/disable ACC, modify desired speed) via ROS2 nodes in the Actuation FE, converting commands to motor voltage and steering servo signals."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Synchronized clocks with 100 ms accuracy for event ordering and coordination; end-to-end latency of ≤100 ms between vehicle and DT Entity for real-time ACC operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Four entities (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User, Cross-System) communicating via ROS2 within vehicle and Wi-Fi between entities; Data Translation FE handles serialization and protocol conversion for all data streams."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates during the 'as operated' lifecycle stage, supporting real-time optimization and health monitoring of the vehicle during active driving operations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 15622 for ACC functionality; latency ≤100 ms and clock sync accuracy of 100 ms for real-time operation; validation through physical vehicle testing."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-vehicle communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; data serialized using OPC Unified Architecture (IEC 62541) or custom protocol via Data Translation FE."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity runs on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano and NX. Data Storage is hosted on an external device. Digital Twin Entity is hosted externally (cloud or separate server) to offload ACC computation from the vehicle."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT structure; ISO 15622 for ACC functionality; 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system requiring ≤100 ms latency and clock synchronization (100 ms accuracy) for real-time operations; no specific cybersecurity measures detailed in the document."
]
